untranslatable_reason: The signal requires monitoring advance/decline line divergence (market breadth indicator not in allowed list). The core logic—detecting when the advance/decline line lags below 80% of prior peak while market averages hit 52-week highs—requires advance/decline data, which is not available in the allowed indicators. The 3-day persistence requirement also cannot be expressed with available operators. This signal requires custom market breadth indicators or data sources not included in the standard backtest engine.
translation_notes: Signal is context-dependent and primarily tactical (reduce long exposure) rather than a binary entry/exit rule. Attempted to approximate exit condition using price relative to sma_50 as a proxy for market deterioration, but this does not capture the true advance/decline divergence mechanism. Recommend implementing a custom advance_decline_line indicator or using an external market breadth data feed.
